name: Salesforce
description: Salesforce is the leading CRM platform. Manage accounts, contacts, leads, opportunities, cases, and custom objects through the REST API with SOQL queries, SOSL search, and composite operations.

capabilities.name: records_query
capabilities.description: Execute a SOQL query to search and retrieve records from any Salesforce object.

capabilities.name: records_query_more
capabilities.description: Retrieve the next batch of records from a SOQL query using a query locator.

capabilities.name: records_search
capabilities.description: Execute a SOSL full-text search across multiple Salesforce objects.

capabilities.name: sobjects_list
capabilities.description: List all available SObject types in the org.

capabilities.name: sobject_describe
capabilities.description: Get metadata describing a Salesforce object including fields, relationships, and properties.

capabilities.name: sobject_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific record by SObject type and ID with selected fields.

capabilities.name: sobject_create
capabilities.description: Create a new record in any standard or custom Salesforce object.

capabilities.name: sobject_update
capabilities.description: Update fields on an existing Salesforce record by ID.

capabilities.name: sobject_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a Salesforce record by SObject type and ID.

capabilities.name: sobject_get_by_external_id
capabilities.description: Retrieve a record using an external ID field.

capabilities.name: sobject_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update a record using an external ID field for matching.

capabilities.name: sobject_collections_create
capabilities.description: Create multiple records in a single request (up to 200).

capabilities.name: sobject_collections_update
capabilities.description: Update multiple records in a single request (up to 200).

capabilities.name: sobject_collections_delete
capabilities.description: Delete multiple records in a single request.

capabilities.name: versions_list
capabilities.description: List available Salesforce REST API versions.

capabilities.name: limits_get
capabilities.description: Get current org limits and usage including API calls, storage, and data limits.
